footer.tagline: Print Error-Free Cheques in Under 2 Minutes

hero.subheadline: Print, track, and manage cheques from any device. Works with 300+ Indian banks. Automatic amount-in-words, MICR validation, and batch printing. No training needed — just sign up and start printing error-free cheques instantly.
hero.noCreditCard: No credit card required. Free forever for basic use.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Description: Create your free account in seconds. No credit card needed.
howItWorks.step2Description: Enter payee details, amount, and select your bank. Cheqify formats everything automatically.
howItWorks.step3Description: Print on any standard cheque leaf using your regular printer. Error-free, every time.

featuresTabs.heading: Everything You Need to Manage Cheques
featuresTabs.subheading: Explore the three pillars of Cheqify
featuresTabs.printingDescription: Print perfectly formatted cheques in seconds. Supports all major Indian bank formats. Auto-fills amount in words, validates MICR codes, and prevents common errors that cause bounces.
featuresTabs.trackingDescription: Track every cheque from issue to clearance. Know instantly which cheques have been deposited, cleared, or returned. Never lose track of a payment again.
featuresTabs.dashboardDescription: Get a bird's-eye view of all cheque activity across your business. Monitor team performance, track outstanding payments, and make data-driven decisions.

testimonials.heading: What Our Users Say
testimonials.t1Quote: Cheqify eliminated cheque errors completely. We used to have 2-3 bounced cheques a month due to handwriting mistakes. Now zero.
testimonials.t2Quote: The lifecycle tracking saved us hours every week. I no longer need to call vendors to ask if they deposited the cheque.
testimonials.t3Quote: I only print 2-3 cheques a year but Cheqify makes it effortless. The free plan is perfect for personal use.

finalCta.heading: Ready to Print Error-Free Cheques?
finalCta.subheading: Join thousands of businesses that trust Cheqify. Start free — no credit card required.

demoVideo.heading: See Cheqify in Action
demoVideo.subheading: Watch how easy it is to print error-free cheques

meta.title: Features | Cheqify.app
meta.description: Explore Cheqify's powerful cheque printing, lifecycle tracking, and owner dashboard features designed for modern businesses.

hero.subheadline: A centralized platform designed to handle the complexity of cheque management with editorial-grade simplicity and iron-clad security.

core.heading: Core Ecosystem
core.printingDescription: Eliminate the manual stress of handwriting. Our system supports any bank format globally with pixel-perfect alignment.
core.printingFeature1Description: Supports all major Indian bank cheque formats out of the box.
core.printingFeature2Description: Automatically converts numbers to words — no manual typing errors.
core.printingFeature3Description: Validates magnetic ink character recognition codes to prevent rejection.
core.printingFeature4Description: Print multiple cheques at once for vendor payments at scale.
core.printingFeature5Description: 300+ bank cheque layouts pre-loaded and ready to use — just select your bank and print. No manual setup needed.
core.printingFeature6Description: Pixel-perfect printing on any cheque leaf regardless of bank or format.
core.printingFeature7Description: Real-time validation prevents common mistakes that cause bounces.
core.printingFeature8Description: Handle cheques in different currencies with automatic formatting.
core.printingFeature9Description: Auto-format dates per bank requirements — DD/MM/YYYY or custom.
core.printingFeature10Description: Quick payee selection from saved contacts for faster cheque preparation.
core.printingFeature11Description: Import cheque data from Excel or CSV files for bulk processing — save hours of manual entry.
core.trackingDescription: Never lose track of a single leaf. From the moment it leaves the book until it clears the bank, you have absolute oversight.
core.trackingFeature1Description: Track every cheque from creation to bank clearance with full visibility.
core.trackingFeature2Description: Instant notifications on cheque status changes — deposit, clear, or return.
core.trackingFeature3Description: Immediate alerts when cheques are returned or bounced by the bank.
core.trackingFeature4Description: Complete history of all cheque transactions searchable by date, payee, or amount.
core.trackingFeature5Description: Download reports in PDF, Excel, and CSV formats for accounting and compliance.
core.trackingFeature6Description: Visual pipeline: Unused, Prepared, Signed, Issued, and Cleared — at a glance.
core.trackingFeature7Description: Track stop payment requests and their status in real time.
core.trackingFeature8Description: Manage PDCs with auto-reminders before due dates to ensure liquidity.
core.trackingFeature9Description: Match issued cheques with bank statements to catch discrepancies early.
core.trackingFeature10Description: Complete log of every action for compliance and accountability.
core.dashboardDescription: Get a bird's-eye view of all cheque activity across your business. Monitor performance and make data-driven decisions.
core.dashboardFeature1Description: Consolidated view of all accounts and cheque activity in one place.
core.dashboardFeature2Description: Track who issued what and when — full accountability across your team.
core.dashboardFeature3Description: See all pending and uncleared cheques with expected clearance dates.
core.dashboardFeature4Description: Data-driven charts and reports to optimize your financial workflows.
core.dashboardFeature5Description: Manage cheques across multiple businesses or projects from one account.
core.dashboardFeature6Description: Control who can print, approve, and monitor with granular permissions.
core.dashboardFeature7Description: Generate reports filtered by date, bank, status, or amount range.
core.dashboardFeature8Description: Full dashboard accessible from any device — desktop, tablet, or phone.
core.dashboardFeature9Description: Centralized alerts for all cheque activities across your organization.
core.dashboardFeature10Description: Export all data in multiple formats for accounting software integration.

highlights.heading: Precision Engineering
highlights.subheading: Micro-features that define the macro experience of elite financial management.
highlights.card1Description: Every action, from click to print, is logged with high-fidelity timestamps and user identity for total accountability.
highlights.card2Description: Consolidate records across hundreds of accounts. Manage diverse bank formats within a single, unified interface.
highlights.card3Description: Smart notifications for PDC (Post-Dated Cheques) ensure you maintain liquidity before clearing dates arrive.
highlights.card4Description: Intuitive interface that anyone on your team can use from day one — no manuals, no onboarding sessions needed.
highlights.card5Description: Desktop, tablet, or phone — access Cheqify from anywhere with no software installation required.
highlights.card6Description: 256-bit encryption and secure data handling ensure your financial information stays protected at all times.
